title: Add Pollinations Avatar Gen to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Tavern portraits, automated
gist.blurb: Someone built a SillyTavern extension that turns character descriptions into avatars with one click. Because imagining what your roleplay characters look like is so last year.
gist.summary: Added 'Pollinations Avatar Gen' to the community showcase, a SillyTavern extension that generates character avatars directly from text descriptions.
gist.impact: SillyTavern users can now instantly generate and assign visual avatars to their characters using the Pollinations image API.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about generating character avatars for SillyTavern (a roleplaying/chat UI). Visuals should include Polly the bee acting as an artist, creating a portrait/avatar. A cozy tavern setting in the background is a perfect nod to 'SillyTavern'.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding up a freshly painted pixel portrait of a fantasy character. They are standing inside a warm, rustic tavern with wooden tables and glowing lanterns. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
